scripts.build: export cargo_prof=release; export rs_lib_outdir=release; bun run wasm-bindgen && bun run wasm-opt && tsc && vite build
scripts.dev: export cargo_prof=dev; export rs_lib_outdir=debug; bun run wasm-bindgen && vite
scripts.wasm-bindgen: bun run cargo && wasm-bindgen --target web --out-dir src rs_lib/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/$rs_lib_outdir/img2tempdecal_web.wasm
